title: 151 Waterproof Multi Purpose Silicone Sealant | Sealing & Filling Gaps & Cracks in All Wet Areas (Clear, 280ml)
features: WATERPROOF SEAL: 151 Multipurpose Silicone Sealant, high quality seal, flexible, durable weather strong seal for many common building surfaces.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Multipurpose Selant, mould resistant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Multipurpose Sealant. Store at room temperature
description: 151Multipurpose Silicone Sealant, a high quality seal, flexible, durable weather strong seal for many common building surfaces. Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying. Mould resistant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns. Ready to use Multipurpose Sealant. Store at room temperature
